dataset: AEDC 2025-2026 company dancers and competition routines
scope: Competition routines only; recital-only/non-competition numbers excluded.
notes: Dancer-to-routine membership is generated from explicit dancers listed in the 2026 routine database.
Company team labels are from the 2025-2026 Teams and Dancers source; some dancers appear in competition routines but do not have a team label in that file.
Routines with no explicit dancer roster in the source were not assigned to dancers.
Image fields are intentionally null because no verified individual image source was provided in the dataset.
